changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_profile ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, keycloak_user_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, display_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, phone_number VARCHAR(13), avatar_url VARCHAR(1024), status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE user_profile IS 'Stores extended profile data for Keycloak-authenticated users';
